supportFunnelFeed.name: Daily Autodigital Shelf Support Funnel Feed
supportFunnelFeed.checkoutBoundary: Product checkout is not connected. Downloads remain public and support is voluntary.

supportFunnel.title: Digital Declutter Sprint
supportFunnel.description: A focused cleanup sheet for one folder, inbox, download pile, or project archive.
supportFunnel.buyer: People whose digital mess blocks useful work but who cannot handle a full cleanup marathon.
supportFunnel.suggestedSupportTiers: $3 Small thank-you: A light support nudge for one useful worksheet. | $9 Bundle supporter: A fair support level for the starter archive. | $21 Keep it running: Helps keep daily publishing, hosting, and maintenance alive.
supportFunnel.fulfillment: public digital download with voluntary external support
supportFunnel.checkoutBoundary: Product checkout is not connected. Downloads remain public and support is voluntary.

supportFunnel.title: Micro Budget Reset
supportFunnel.description: A one-page reset for seeing near-term bills, small leaks, and the next cash decision.
supportFunnel.buyer: Solo households and freelancers who need a short money picture without a complex finance app.
supportFunnel.suggestedSupportTiers: $3 Small thank-you: A light support nudge for one useful worksheet. | $9 Bundle supporter: A fair support level for the starter archive. | $21 Keep it running: Helps keep daily publishing, hosting, and maintenance alive.
supportFunnel.fulfillment: public digital download with voluntary external support
supportFunnel.checkoutBoundary: Product checkout is not connected. Downloads remain public and support is voluntary.

supportFunnel.title: Tiny Home Inventory Pack
supportFunnel.description: A room-by-room mini inventory for renters, homeowners, resellers, and insurance prep.
supportFunnel.buyer: People who need a simple physical inventory without a full spreadsheet system.
supportFunnel.suggestedSupportTiers: $3 Small thank-you: A light support nudge for one useful worksheet. | $9 Bundle supporter: A fair support level for the starter archive. | $21 Keep it running: Helps keep daily publishing, hosting, and maintenance alive.
supportFunnel.fulfillment: public digital download with voluntary external support
supportFunnel.checkoutBoundary: Product checkout is not connected. Downloads remain public and support is voluntary.

supportFunnel.title: Low-Energy Week Planner
supportFunnel.description: A gentle planning sheet for weeks where consistency matters more than intensity.
supportFunnel.buyer: Disabled and neurodivergent workers who need low-friction planning without motivational noise.
supportFunnel.suggestedSupportTiers: $3 Small thank-you: A light support nudge for one useful worksheet. | $9 Bundle supporter: A fair support level for the starter archive. | $21 Keep it running: Helps keep daily publishing, hosting, and maintenance alive.
supportFunnel.fulfillment: public digital download with voluntary external support
supportFunnel.checkoutBoundary: Product checkout is not connected. Downloads remain public and support is voluntary.

supportFunnel.title: Receipt Runner Ledger Pack
supportFunnel.description: A simple ledger and daily receipt habit for tiny projects that need proof of movement.
supportFunnel.buyer: People who lose progress in scattered notes and need a visible record of what changed.
supportFunnel.suggestedSupportTiers: $3 Small thank-you: A light support nudge for one useful worksheet. | $9 Bundle supporter: A fair support level for the starter archive. | $21 Keep it running: Helps keep daily publishing, hosting, and maintenance alive.
supportFunnel.fulfillment: public digital download with voluntary external support
supportFunnel.checkoutBoundary: Product checkout is not connected. Downloads remain public and support is voluntary.

supportFunnel.title: Calm Launch One-Page Kit
supportFunnel.description: A printable page for turning one messy idea into one offer, one audience, and one next action.
supportFunnel.buyer: Creators, solo operators, and small service shops with an idea that keeps staying unfinished.
supportFunnel.suggestedSupportTiers: $3 Small thank-you: A light support nudge for one useful worksheet. | $9 Bundle supporter: A fair support level for the starter archive. | $21 Keep it running: Helps keep daily publishing, hosting, and maintenance alive.
supportFunnel.fulfillment: public digital download with voluntary external support
supportFunnel.checkoutBoundary: Product checkout is not connected. Downloads remain public and support is voluntary.

supportFunnel.title: Landing Page Copy Blocks
supportFunnel.description: A fill-in worksheet for headline, promise, proof, offer, and next action copy.
supportFunnel.buyer: Small operators who need usable page copy before a designer or builder gets involved.
supportFunnel.suggestedSupportTiers: $3 Small thank-you: A light support nudge for one useful worksheet. | $9 Bundle supporter: A fair support level for the starter archive. | $21 Keep it running: Helps keep daily publishing, hosting, and maintenance alive.
supportFunnel.fulfillment: public digital download with voluntary external support
supportFunnel.checkoutBoundary: Product checkout is not connected. Downloads remain public and support is voluntary.

supportFunnel.title: Renewal Reminder Sheet
supportFunnel.description: A small tracker for domain, software, insurance, lease, and service renewal dates.
supportFunnel.buyer: People who need renewal dates visible before they become urgent surprises.
supportFunnel.suggestedSupportTiers: $3 Small thank-you: A light support nudge for one useful worksheet. | $9 Bundle supporter: A fair support level for the starter archive. | $21 Keep it running: Helps keep daily publishing, hosting, and maintenance alive.
supportFunnel.fulfillment: public digital download with voluntary external support
supportFunnel.checkoutBoundary: Product checkout is not connected. Downloads remain public and support is voluntary.

supportFunnel.title: Link-in-Bio Audit
supportFunnel.description: A simple audit sheet for checking whether a public profile points visitors to one useful action.
supportFunnel.buyer: Creators and small sellers whose public links do not clearly route visitors.
supportFunnel.suggestedSupportTiers: $3 Small thank-you: A light support nudge for one useful worksheet. | $9 Bundle supporter: A fair support level for the starter archive. | $21 Keep it running: Helps keep daily publishing, hosting, and maintenance alive.
supportFunnel.fulfillment: public digital download with voluntary external support
supportFunnel.checkoutBoundary: Product checkout is not connected. Downloads remain public and support is voluntary.

supportFunnel.title: Focus Menu Builder
supportFunnel.description: A menu of low, medium, and high energy task options for days when planning from scratch is too expensive.
supportFunnel.buyer: People who need usable work choices that adapt to uneven energy.
supportFunnel.suggestedSupportTiers: $3 Small thank-you: A light support nudge for one useful worksheet. | $9 Bundle supporter: A fair support level for the starter archive. | $21 Keep it running: Helps keep daily publishing, hosting, and maintenance alive.
supportFunnel.fulfillment: public digital download with voluntary external support
supportFunnel.checkoutBoundary: Product checkout is not connected. Downloads remain public and support is voluntary.

supportFunnel.title: Store Import Prep Sheet
supportFunnel.description: A worksheet for gathering product title, description, price hint, tags, and delivery files before using a store platform.
supportFunnel.buyer: Digital sellers preparing listings for Payhip, Gumroad, Etsy-style shops, or similar platforms.
supportFunnel.suggestedSupportTiers: $3 Small thank-you: A light support nudge for one useful worksheet. | $9 Bundle supporter: A fair support level for the starter archive. | $21 Keep it running: Helps keep daily publishing, hosting, and maintenance alive.
supportFunnel.fulfillment: public digital download with voluntary external support
supportFunnel.checkoutBoundary: Product checkout is not connected. Downloads remain public and support is voluntary.

supportFunnel.title: Two-Hour Workblock Planner
supportFunnel.description: A compact planning sheet for choosing one outcome, one timer, and one shutdown note.
supportFunnel.buyer: People who need a bounded work session that does not expand into the whole day.
supportFunnel.suggestedSupportTiers: $3 Small thank-you: A light support nudge for one useful worksheet. | $9 Bundle supporter: A fair support level for the starter archive. | $21 Keep it running: Helps keep daily publishing, hosting, and maintenance alive.
supportFunnel.fulfillment: public digital download with voluntary external support
supportFunnel.checkoutBoundary: Product checkout is not connected. Downloads remain public and support is voluntary.

supportFunnel.title: Simple Order Form Draft
supportFunnel.description: A draft sheet for designing a small order or request form before building it online.
supportFunnel.buyer: Small sellers and service providers who need a clear order form before platform setup.
supportFunnel.suggestedSupportTiers: $3 Small thank-you: A light support nudge for one useful worksheet. | $9 Bundle supporter: A fair support level for the starter archive. | $21 Keep it running: Helps keep daily publishing, hosting, and maintenance alive.
supportFunnel.fulfillment: public digital download with voluntary external support
supportFunnel.checkoutBoundary: Product checkout is not connected. Downloads remain public and support is voluntary.

supportFunnel.title: Daily Proof Log
supportFunnel.description: A receipt-style log for recording visible proof of work without overexplaining the whole day.
supportFunnel.buyer: Solo workers who need evidence of progress for themselves, clients, or future handoff.
supportFunnel.suggestedSupportTiers: $3 Small thank-you: A light support nudge for one useful worksheet. | $9 Bundle supporter: A fair support level for the starter archive. | $21 Keep it running: Helps keep daily publishing, hosting, and maintenance alive.
supportFunnel.fulfillment: public digital download with voluntary external support
supportFunnel.checkoutBoundary: Product checkout is not connected. Downloads remain public and support is voluntary.

supportFunnel.title: Project Rescue Map
supportFunnel.description: A one-page map for rescuing a messy project by separating assets, blockers, risks, and next moves.
supportFunnel.buyer: Builders and operators who need to recover a project without starting over.
supportFunnel.suggestedSupportTiers: $3 Small thank-you: A light support nudge for one useful worksheet. | $9 Bundle supporter: A fair support level for the starter archive. | $21 Keep it running: Helps keep daily publishing, hosting, and maintenance alive.
supportFunnel.fulfillment: public digital download with voluntary external support
supportFunnel.checkoutBoundary: Product checkout is not connected. Downloads remain public and support is voluntary.

supportFunnel.title: Email Triage Sprint
supportFunnel.description: A 15-minute inbox worksheet for finding the few messages that actually need action.
supportFunnel.buyer: People who avoid inboxes because every message feels equally urgent.
supportFunnel.suggestedSupportTiers: $3 Small thank-you: A light support nudge for one useful worksheet. | $9 Bundle supporter: A fair support level for the starter archive. | $21 Keep it running: Helps keep daily publishing, hosting, and maintenance alive.
supportFunnel.fulfillment: public digital download with voluntary external support
supportFunnel.checkoutBoundary: Product checkout is not connected. Downloads remain public and support is voluntary.

supportFunnel.title: Decision Parking Lot
supportFunnel.description: A worksheet for parking unresolved decisions so they stop interrupting the current task.
supportFunnel.buyer: People who get pulled away by unresolved choices and need a simple holding place.
supportFunnel.suggestedSupportTiers: $3 Small thank-you: A light support nudge for one useful worksheet. | $9 Bundle supporter: A fair support level for the starter archive. | $21 Keep it running: Helps keep daily publishing, hosting, and maintenance alive.
supportFunnel.fulfillment: public digital download with voluntary external support
supportFunnel.checkoutBoundary: Product checkout is not connected. Downloads remain public and support is voluntary.

supportFunnel.title: Tiny Launch Checklist
supportFunnel.description: A compact launch checklist for publishing a small page, pack, or offer without waiting for perfect.
supportFunnel.buyer: People with useful work stuck in draft mode who need a small publish path.
supportFunnel.suggestedSupportTiers: $3 Small thank-you: A light support nudge for one useful worksheet. | $9 Bundle supporter: A fair support level for the starter archive. | $21 Keep it running: Helps keep daily publishing, hosting, and maintenance alive.
supportFunnel.fulfillment: public digital download with voluntary external support
supportFunnel.checkoutBoundary: Product checkout is not connected. Downloads remain public and support is voluntary.

supportFunnel.title: Micro Offer Pricing Sheet
supportFunnel.description: A simple worksheet for pricing a small digital or service offer without pretending the market is guaranteed.
supportFunnel.buyer: Creators and service providers turning a small repeatable outcome into an offer.
supportFunnel.suggestedSupportTiers: $3 Small thank-you: A light support nudge for one useful worksheet. | $9 Bundle supporter: A fair support level for the starter archive. | $21 Keep it running: Helps keep daily publishing, hosting, and maintenance alive.
supportFunnel.fulfillment: public digital download with voluntary external support
supportFunnel.checkoutBoundary: Product checkout is not connected. Downloads remain public and support is voluntary.

supportFunnel.title: Weekly Reset Board
supportFunnel.description: A printable reset board for tasks, bills, errands, and loose ends that need one weekly review.
supportFunnel.buyer: Busy households and solo workers who need one visible weekly reset page.
supportFunnel.suggestedSupportTiers: $3 Small thank-you: A light support nudge for one useful worksheet. | $9 Bundle supporter: A fair support level for the starter archive. | $21 Keep it running: Helps keep daily publishing, hosting, and maintenance alive.
supportFunnel.fulfillment: public digital download with voluntary external support
supportFunnel.checkoutBoundary: Product checkout is not connected. Downloads remain public and support is voluntary.

supportFunnel.title: One-Page SOP Builder
supportFunnel.description: A worksheet for documenting one repeatable task so someone else can follow it.
supportFunnel.buyer: Small teams and solo operators who need process notes without a full operations manual.
supportFunnel.suggestedSupportTiers: $3 Small thank-you: A light support nudge for one useful worksheet. | $9 Bundle supporter: A fair support level for the starter archive. | $21 Keep it running: Helps keep daily publishing, hosting, and maintenance alive.
supportFunnel.fulfillment: public digital download with voluntary external support
supportFunnel.checkoutBoundary: Product checkout is not connected. Downloads remain public and support is voluntary.

supportFunnel.title: Listing Photo Checklist
supportFunnel.description: A practical shot list for creating clearer marketplace, rental, or product listing photos.
supportFunnel.buyer: People preparing simple listings who need better photos without hiring a photographer.
supportFunnel.suggestedSupportTiers: $3 Small thank-you: A light support nudge for one useful worksheet. | $9 Bundle supporter: A fair support level for the starter archive. | $21 Keep it running: Helps keep daily publishing, hosting, and maintenance alive.
supportFunnel.fulfillment: public digital download with voluntary external support
supportFunnel.checkoutBoundary: Product checkout is not connected. Downloads remain public and support is voluntary.

supportFunnel.title: Client Intake Lite
supportFunnel.description: A small intake sheet for turning a vague request into scope, timeline, budget, and next action.
supportFunnel.buyer: Service providers who need a repeatable first-call intake without a heavy CRM.
supportFunnel.suggestedSupportTiers: $3 Small thank-you: A light support nudge for one useful worksheet. | $9 Bundle supporter: A fair support level for the starter archive. | $21 Keep it running: Helps keep daily publishing, hosting, and maintenance alive.
supportFunnel.fulfillment: public digital download with voluntary external support
supportFunnel.checkoutBoundary: Product checkout is not connected. Downloads remain public and support is voluntary.

supportFunnel.title: Appointment Prep Card
supportFunnel.description: A one-page prep card for collecting questions, documents, and follow-up notes before an appointment.
supportFunnel.buyer: People who forget key questions or documents when appointments get stressful.
supportFunnel.suggestedSupportTiers: $3 Small thank-you: A light support nudge for one useful worksheet. | $9 Bundle supporter: A fair support level for the starter archive. | $21 Keep it running: Helps keep daily publishing, hosting, and maintenance alive.
supportFunnel.fulfillment: public digital download with voluntary external support
supportFunnel.checkoutBoundary: Product checkout is not connected. Downloads remain public and support is voluntary.

supportFunnel.title: Downloads Folder Reset
supportFunnel.description: A 20-minute digital cleanup worksheet for turning a downloads pile into decisions.
supportFunnel.buyer: People whose downloads folder has become a source of friction and lost files.
supportFunnel.suggestedSupportTiers: $3 Small thank-you: A light support nudge for one useful worksheet. | $9 Bundle supporter: A fair support level for the starter archive. | $21 Keep it running: Helps keep daily publishing, hosting, and maintenance alive.
supportFunnel.fulfillment: public digital download with voluntary external support
supportFunnel.checkoutBoundary: Product checkout is not connected. Downloads remain public and support is voluntary.

supportFunnel.title: Invoice Follow-Up Mini Kit
supportFunnel.description: A calm worksheet for tracking unpaid invoices and writing one clear follow-up.
supportFunnel.buyer: Freelancers and service providers who need a polite payment follow-up without pressure tricks.
supportFunnel.suggestedSupportTiers: $3 Small thank-you: A light support nudge for one useful worksheet. | $9 Bundle supporter: A fair support level for the starter archive. | $21 Keep it running: Helps keep daily publishing, hosting, and maintenance alive.
supportFunnel.fulfillment: public digital download with voluntary external support
supportFunnel.checkoutBoundary: Product checkout is not connected. Downloads remain public and support is voluntary.

supportFunnel.title: Simple Content Calendar
supportFunnel.description: A low-pressure one-week content planner for small brands, creators, and solo operators.
supportFunnel.buyer: People who need a content plan that does not become a second full-time job.
supportFunnel.suggestedSupportTiers: $3 Small thank-you: A light support nudge for one useful worksheet. | $9 Bundle supporter: A fair support level for the starter archive. | $21 Keep it running: Helps keep daily publishing, hosting, and maintenance alive.

supportFunnel.checkoutBoundary: Product checkout is not connected. Downloads remain public and support is voluntary.

supportFunnel.title: Subscription Audit Sheet
supportFunnel.description: A quick worksheet for finding recurring charges, renewal dates, and pause candidates.
supportFunnel.buyer: Households and freelancers who need a clearer view of subscriptions without a finance app.
supportFunnel.suggestedSupportTiers: $3 Small thank-you: A light support nudge for one useful worksheet. | $9 Bundle supporter: A fair support level for the starter archive. | $21 Keep it running: Helps keep daily publishing, hosting, and maintenance alive.

supportFunnel.checkoutBoundary: Product checkout is not connected. Downloads remain public and support is voluntary.

supportFunnel.title: Honest Follow-Up Draft Kit
supportFunnel.description: A non-spam template sheet for following up with one real person or lead.
supportFunnel.buyer: Service providers who need a clear follow-up without manipulation, fake urgency, or bulk blasting.
supportFunnel.suggestedSupportTiers: $3 Small thank-you: A light support nudge for one useful worksheet. | $9 Bundle supporter: A fair support level for the starter archive. | $21 Keep it running: Helps keep daily publishing, hosting, and maintenance alive.

supportFunnel.description: A simple worksheet for pricing a small digital or service offer without pretending the market is guaranteed.
supportFunnel.buyer: Creators and service providers turning a small repeatable outcome into an offer.
supportFunnel.suggestedSupportTiers: $3 Small thank-you: A light support nudge for one useful worksheet. | $9 Bundle supporter: A fair support level for the starter archive. | $21 Keep it running: Helps keep daily publishing, hosting, and maintenance alive.
supportFunnel.fulfillment: public digital download with voluntary external support
supportFunnel.checkoutBoundary: Product checkout is not connected. Downloads remain public and support is voluntary.

supportFunnel.title: Weekly Reset Board
supportFunnel.description: A printable reset board for tasks, bills, errands, and loose ends that need one weekly review.
supportFunnel.buyer: Busy households and solo workers who need one visible weekly reset page.
supportFunnel.suggestedSupportTiers: $3 Small thank-you: A light support nudge for one useful worksheet. | $9 Bundle supporter: A fair support level for the starter archive. | $21 Keep it running: Helps keep daily publishing, hosting, and maintenance alive.
supportFunnel.fulfillment: public digital download with voluntary external support
supportFunnel.checkoutBoundary: Product checkout is not connected. Downloads remain public and support is voluntary.
